response.justification: While the candidate meets the baseline requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience and possesses an entrepreneurial background, they lack the Director-level seniority and deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy required for this Principal role. Their AI experience is very recent and primarily implementation-focused, missing the strategic customer advisory and cross-functional leadership components central to the position.
strengths: Over 15 years of broad software engineering experience
Entrepreneurial drive demonstrated by founding an open-source platform
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and tooling
concerns: Lacks Director-level strategic leadership and advisory experience
AI expertise is very recent and not at a recognized industry level
No demonstrated experience advising strategic enterprise customers
